verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I started out to built a house of my dreams On life's shifting sands And with no thought of the wind, Or the rains that would come, with haste, I began. I gathered pleasures of every kind, Every thrill that I could find, Till, at last, the house of my dreams was finally mine.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I was so proud of the house that I had built, I wanted all to see. Just what I had made out of my life, It looked so good to me. Until one day when the rains began, And from my house I quickly ran. In time to see my shattered dreams fall to the sand.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: So now I'm building again, But not as before My foolish dreams are all gone. I found it's not so important the house that you build, Is what your build it upon. And now I found me a Rock that's sure, It shall forever more endure Though every storm of life I'm shattered, safe and secure.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And now I'm building on the Rock, Upon the solid Rock. The Rock that shall forever more endure. So let the storm clouds rise. The strong winds blow Let the rains come and go. For in Jesus forever I am safe For in Jesus forever I am safe For in Jesus forever I am safe Forevermore. Safe evermore.
